non_scope: Production runtime, API, activation, feature-lock, dependency, or source changes; responder generalization or non-loopback support; interface enumeration or default selection; other groups, ports, address families, hosts, or platforms; portable retry inference; Quest or other devices; unsafe/FFI; copied source; commands; stream admission, routing, identity, or Manifold authority.

Standard policy, public boundary, documentation/instruction, owner, and workflow contracts pass.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; keep driver, raw packets, interface address/name, endpoint, diagnostics, environment, and machine identity private; publish sanitized evidence only after two complete repeats.
